concepts.notes: Editorial addition aligned with the existing A2 compare family. CEFR confirmed in dedicated review on 2026-03-21.

Editorial addition from English lemma expansion. Modeled around the general idea of distance between places or points. German uses Entfernung as the neutral concrete term; Distanz is also accepted here as a common cognate and broader or slightly more formal alternative. Kept separate from the race-specific sense already covered elsewhere.

Editorial addition from the Italian pulire/lavare ambiguity audit. Modeled around more formal or technical cleaning that removes dirt, residue, or other substances thoroughly. Kept separate from putzen = everyday household cleaning and waschen = washing with water.

Editorial addition completing the waschen/putzen/reinigen cluster. Modeled around rinsing with water, especially dishes, glasses, or other objects. Kept separate from waschen = wash the body or clothes, putzen = everyday cleaning, and reinigen = more formal or technical cleaning. The toilet-flush sense is intentionally excluded.

Editorial addition from German surface expansion. Normalized from the surface form 'spitze' to the adjective lemma 'spitz'. Modeled only for the physical pointed or tapered sense. Kept separate from the noun 'Spitze', from colloquial 'spitze!' = great, and from the figurative biting-remark sense.

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled for the physical tip, point, or topmost end of an object or structure. Kept separate from colloquial spitze = great, from Spitze = lace, and from abstract leadership or top-position uses.

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the gap or safe space between people or things, not the general route-length sense already covered by Entfernung. CEFR placed editorially at A2 on 2026-04-17.
Editorial addition aligned with the existing compare family. Modeled as the noun difference sense and kept separate from the adjective unterschiedlich. CEFR placed editorially at A2 on 2026-04-17.
ED-05: level raised to B1 on 2026-05-25. The discourse-level broadening use ('Überhaupt trinke ich wenig Kaffee.') is not a beginner pattern. See DL-012.

Editorial polysemy split (BUG-ED-04 / VBR-149-2). Models einfach in the figurative sense 'plain/modest' (lifestyle, taste), distinct from the physical-difficulty concept (ec6fe4e3), the adverbial concept (concept-a1-einfach-just), and the travel concept (concept-a1-einfach-oneway).
MT-C5 pilot: most-referenced dangling sense (15+ concepts list it as antonym).
MT-C5 pilot: antonym counterpart of the core word wichtig (A1).
MT-C5 pilot: dangling synonym of deutlich (A2) and antonym anchor for unklar/vage.
MT-C5 pilot: antonym counterpart of the core words oft/immer (A1).
MT-C5 pilot: dangling antonym of kommen (A1) and neighbor of aussteigen.

lexemes.notes: approved plural batch 3; 'formale' is redundant since Antrag is inherently formal - review whether 'la domanda' or 'l'istanza' is a better primary
approved plural batch 3; periphrastic rendering - no single Italian word maps exactly to Anfrage
Used in Italian to convey the emphatic or exasperated tone of German überhaupt in questions (e.g. 'Ma poi cosa vuoi?'). Italian does not have a direct single-particle equivalent for this function.
Translates the emphatic particle function of German überhaupt in rhetorical or frustrated questions (e.g. 'What are you even doing here?').

concept_definitions.short_definition: Mettere due o più cose una accanto all'altra per vedere somiglianze o differenze.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To examine two or more things side by side to see similarities or differences.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This means making an intentional comparison, not just noticing one difference.

Also in a surprising case; more than expected.
Das Betrachten von zwei oder mehr Dingen, um Ähnlichkeiten oder Unterschiede festzustellen.
L'osservazione di due o più cose per vedere somiglianze o differenze.
Looking at two or more things to see similarities or differences.
Der Abstand zwischen zwei Orten oder Punkten.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Entfernung ist die neutrale Standardwahl für messbare räumliche Distanz; Distanz ist hier ebenfalls akzeptiert, klingt aber oft etwas formeller oder breiter.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Lo spazio che separa due luoghi o due punti.
The amount of space between two places or points.
Etwas gründlich oder fachlich von Schmutz, Rückständen oder anderen Stoffen befreien.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Formeller und technischer als putzen; häufig bei Filtern, Geräten, Oberflächen oder Materialien.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Liberare qualcosa in modo accurato o più tecnico da sporco, residui o altre sostanze.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Più formale o tecnico del normale pulire di casa; utile per filtri, dispositivi, superfici o materiali.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To remove dirt, residue, or other substances from something in a thorough or more technical way.
concept_definitions.usage_note: More formal or technical than the everyday household sense; useful for filters, devices, surfaces, or materials.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Mit Wasser Essensreste, Seife oder andere Rückstände von Geschirr, Gläsern oder anderen Dingen entfernen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Oft bei Tellern, Tassen, Gläsern oder Haaren; hier nicht im Sinn von eine Toilette spülen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Togliere con l'acqua residui di cibo, sapone o altre sostanze da piatti, bicchieri o altri oggetti.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Spesso per stoviglie, bicchieri o capelli; qui non nel senso di tirare l'acqua del water.

concept_definitions.short_definition: To remove food, soap, or other residue with water from dishes, glasses, or other objects.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Often used for dishes, glasses, or hair; not used here in the sense of flushing a toilet.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Mit einem schmalen, zulaufenden Ende oder einer Form, die sich zum Ende hin verengt.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur die körperliche Form eines Gegenstands; nicht die umgangssprachliche Bewertung spitze! = großartig und nicht die übertragene Bedeutung für verletzende Bemerkungen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Che termina con una punta stretta o con una forma che si assottiglia verso la fine.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo il senso fisico della forma; non il valore figurato di osservazione pungente.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Having a narrow end or a shape that becomes thinner toward the end.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the physical shape sense is modeled here, not the figurative sense for biting remarks.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Der äußerste, schmale oder oberste Endpunkt eines Gegenstands oder Bauwerks.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur die körperliche Spitze oder der oberste Abschluss; getrennt von Führung oder Topposition und von Spitze als Stoff.

concept_definitions.short_definition: La parte più estrema, sottile o più alta di un oggetto o di una struttura.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo il senso fisico di punta o estremità superiore, non altri usi figurati.

concept_definitions.short_definition: The narrow end or the highest end point of an object or structure.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the physical tip or upper end is modeled here, not broader abstract uses.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Der freie Raum oder die ausreichende Distanz zwischen Personen oder Dingen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es eher um Zwischenraum oder Sicherheitsabstand als um die Strecke zwischen zwei Orten; dafür steht eher Entfernung.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Lo spazio o margine da lasciare tra persone o cose.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui soprattutto nel senso di spazio o distanza di sicurezza, non della lunghezza di un percorso.

concept_definitions.short_definition: The space or safe distance between people or things.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This focuses on gap or clearance, not the general distance between places.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Etwas, worin zwei oder mehr Dinge nicht gleich sind.
Cio in cui due o piu cose non sono uguali.
The way in which two or more things are not the same.
Spricht über etwas in sehr allgemeinen Zügen.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Parla di qualcosa in termini ampi e non in un caso specifico.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Talks about something in broad terms rather than in one specific case.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Wird in einer betonten Frage benutzt, um etwas in Zweifel zu ziehen oder herauszufordern.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Usato in una domanda enfatica per mettere in dubbio se qualcosa abbia davvero senso o sia possibile.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Used in a question to challenge whether something is really true, relevant, or possible.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Nicht deutlich oder verständlich; mehrdeutig.
Not clear or easy to understand; ambiguous.
Non chiaro o facile da capire; ambiguo.
Schnell und intensiv über eine kurze Distanz laufen.
Correre velocemente e intensamente per una breve distanza.
Run quickly and intensely over a short distance.
Sich sehr schnell bewegen.
Muoversi molto velocemente.
To move very fast.
Die Umstände oder Bedingungen, die etwas beeinflussen.
Le circostanze o condizioni che influenzano qualcosa.
The circumstances or conditions that influence something.
Etwas durch Nachforschung oder Überlegung entdecken.
Discover something through research or reasoning.
Ein kleiner Pfeil, der in einem Spiel auf eine Scheibe geworfen wird.
A small arrow thrown at a board in a game.
Ein Ereignis, bei dem mehrere Teilnehmer gegeneinander antreten.
Un evento in cui più partecipanti si sfidano tra loro.
An event where multiple participants compete against each other.
Bescheiden, ohne Luxus oder Verzierungen.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur im Sinne von 'schlicht, bescheiden' (z. B. Lebensstil); nicht 'leicht' (siehe Konzept ec6fe4e3).

concept_definitions.short_definition: Modest, without luxury or decoration.
Modesto, senza lusso o decorazioni.
Absichtlich so tun, als ob etwas nicht da wäre.
Fare finta che qualcosa non esista.
To act as if something is not there.
Ohne Bedeutung für die Sache.
Che non merita attenzione.
Not worth attention.
Leicht zu verstehen.
Facile da capire.
Easy to understand.
Fast nie.
Quasi mai.
Almost never.
Von einem Ort weggehen.
Andare via da un luogo.
To go away from a place.
